558 HYPOGLYCEMIC_TKNG_DSCHRG_CD HYPOGLYCEMIC_TKNG_DSCHRG_CD High-Risk Drug (Is taking): Hypoglycemic (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was taking any medications by pharmacological classification, not how it is used, 
from the hypoglycemic class. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
559 HYPOGLYCEMIC_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD
